case_title: CESAR MEJIA VS. HAKUNA SERVICES, INC., ET AL

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Action Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CESAR MEJIA's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Action Claims Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss plaintiff's individual claims with prejudice and class action claims without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RBU)
